---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Tess OS
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and where does Tess OS get in the way today? Describe
the underlying need, not just the proposed solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Be concrete about behavior, commands, or doctrine
changes.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Scope / impact

- Which component(s) would this touch? (engine, vault, doctrine, wizard, hooks,
  roster, docs)
- Does it change a framework-owned, lock-tracked file? (If so, note that
  `tessctl doctor` / `verify` and the merge base are involved.)
- Any backward-compatibility or upgrade considerations?

## Anything else

Links, prior art, or additional context.
